title: brachiaria orthostachys
intro: Brachiaria orthostachys, also known as Khaminchi or Sosun, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachiaria orthostachys include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Brachiaria orthostachys is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its leaves and stems can be dried or fresh for medicinal use.
